da nang.season_notes: Dry and sunny season is best for beach activities. Sep-Dec can be rainy.
transport_notes: Airport is close to city center, usually 10-20 minutes by car
Motorbike rental is common for short urban routes
local_tips: Visit beach early morning or after 4pm to avoid strong sun
Ba Na Hills can be much colder than city center
common_scams: Unlisted seafood prices in tourist-heavy areas
Peak-hour ride prices near events or holidays

hoi an.season_notes: Dry season is comfortable for walking old town. Flood risk can increase in late rainy season.
transport_notes: Cycling is convenient for old town and nearby villages
Walking is best inside old town core
local_tips: Early morning and evening are most comfortable for old town walks
common_scams: Overpriced lantern boat rides without clear quote

ha noi.season_notes: Cool and dry months are ideal for city exploration.
transport_notes: Traffic is dense during rush hours
Ride-hailing and buses are practical for inner-city travel
local_tips: Avoid old quarter traffic peaks around commute times
Weekends around Hoan Kiem have walking streets
common_scams: Taxi route detours for tourists unfamiliar with area

ho chi minh.season_notes: Dry season has less rain interruptions for outdoor plans.
transport_notes: Short inner-city moves are often faster by motorbike ride-hailing
Storm showers can cause temporary traffic jams
local_tips: Reserve rooftop or popular restaurants in advance on weekends
common_scams: High quoted prices from unmetered taxis

phu quoc.season_notes: Calmer sea conditions are more common in dry season.
transport_notes: Airport transfer times vary by island zone
Scooter and car rental are both common
local_tips: Book cable-car attractions early in peak season
common_scams: No posted prices in some seafood restaurants

family: Keep transfer durations moderate for children
Prioritize attractions with restroom and food access
adventure: Plan backup activities in case of weather changes
Add safety checks and gear notes for each activity
food: Distribute signature local dishes across days
Avoid repeating same meal type in consecutive slots
relax: Limit schedule density and keep flexible afternoon slots
